samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>An arithmetic logic unit (ALU) for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">A 6-bit control signal for selecting the operation.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit output representing the result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">A 1-bit output indicating whether the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">A 1-bit output indicating whether a carry occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">A 1-bit output indicating whether the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">A 1-bit output indicating whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">A 1-bit output representing a general flag, which is set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU).</output>
    </ports>
    
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="ADD">6'b100000</param>
        <param id="ADDU">6'b100001</param>
        <param id="SUB">6'b100010</param>
        <param id="SUBU">6'b100011</param>
        <param id="AND">6'b100100</param>
        <param id="OR">6'b100101</param>
        <param id="XOR">6'b100110</param>
        <param id="NOR">6'b100111</param>
        <param id="SLT">6'b101010</param>
        <param id="SLTU">6'b101011</param>
        <param id="SLL">6'b000000</param>
        <param id="SRL">6'b000010</param>
        <param id="SRA">6'b000011</param>
        <param id="SLLV">6'b000100</param>
        <param id="SRLV">6'b000110</param>
        <param id="SRAV">6'b000111</param>
        <param id="LUI">6'b001111</param>
    </parameter_description>
    
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="a_signed" width_description="[31:0]">Signed version of input operand a.</assign>
        <assign id="b_signed" width_description="[31:0]">Signed version of input operand b.</assign>
        <assign id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation.</assign>
        
        <assign id="flag">Flag is set to '1' when the operation is SLT or SLTU, and 'z' (high impedance) otherwise.</assign>
        <assign id="zero">Zero is set to '1' when the result is all zeros, and '0' otherwise.</assign>
        <assign id="carry">Carry is set to '1' when the operation is ADD or SUB, and 'z' (high impedance) otherwise.</assign>
        <assign id="negative">Negative is set to '1' when the result is negative, and '0' otherwise.</assign>
        <assign id="overflow">Overflow is set to '1' when the operation is ADD or SUB, and 'z' (high impedance) otherwise.</assign>
    </logic_description>
    
    <implementation>
        // Assign input operands to signed wires
        wire [31:0] a_signed;
        wire [31:0] b_signed;
        assign a_signed = $signed(a);
        assign b_signed = $signed(b);
        
        // Assign output result to lower 32 bits of register
        reg [31:0] res;
        assign r = res[31:0];
        
        // Assign flag based on control signal
        assign flag = (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) ? 1'b1 : 1'bz;
        
        // Assign zero based on result
        assign zero = (res == 32'h00000000) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
        
        // Assign carry based on control signal
        assign carry = (aluc == ADD || aluc == SUB) ? 1'b1 : 1'bz;
        
        // Assign negative based on result
        assign negative = (res[31] == 1'b1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
        
        // Assign overflow based on control signal
        assign overflow = (aluc == ADD || aluc == SUB) ? 1'b1 : 1'bz;
        
        // Perform operation based on control signal
        always @(*) begin
            case(aluc)
                ADD: res <= a + b;
                ADDU: res <= a + b;
                SUB: res <= a - b;
                SUBU: res <= a - b;
                AND: res <= a & b;
                OR: res <= a | b;
                XOR: res <= a ^ b;
                NOR: res <= ~(a | b);
                SLT: res <= (a_signed < b_signed) ? 32'h00000001 : 32'h00000000;
                SLTU: res <= (a < b) ? 32'h00000001 : 32'h00000000;
                SLL: res <= b << a[4:0];
                SRL: res <= b >> a[4:0];
                SRA: res <= b >>> a[4:0];
                SLLV: res <= b << a[4:0];
                SRLV: res <= b >> a[4:0];
                SRAV: res <= b >>> a[4:0];
                LUI: res <= {a[15:0], 16'h0000};
                default: res <= 32'hxxxxxxxx;
            endcase
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
